deep_dive.title: Mobile Target Search with Imperfect Perception: A Partially Observable Stochastic Game Theoretical Approach
deep_dive.abstract: This paper investigates mobile target search under imperfect perceptions caused by sensor limitations, malicious jamming, or communication noise. Searchers and targets operate in a grid-shaped area with bounded mobility, leading to a dynamic interplay between search and evasion. To capture this adversarial interaction under imperfect perceptions, we adopt the partially observable stochastic game (POSG) approach, which generalizes partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) by incorporating target intelligence. To handle false alarms and missed detections caused by perceptual uncertainties, we propose a novel detectability concept to determine whether a search strategy guarantees eventual detection, and provide sufficient detectability criteria based on stochastic recurrence analysis. We further develop a server-assisted distributed algorithm that utilizes the aggregative potential game structure for searchers and a KL-divergence-based reduction for target prediction. Numerical simulations validate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm and support the detectability analysis.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: partially observable stochastic game for mobile target search with evasion
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 部分可观察随机博弈用于移动目标搜索与逃避
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 部分可观察随机博弈用于移动目标搜索与逃避
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 部分可观察随机博弈用于移动目标搜索与逃避
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Models mobile target search as a POSG with imperfect perception, providing detectability guarantees and game-theoretic solution.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对传感器限制或干扰导致的不完美感知下的移动目标搜索问题，采用部分可观察随机博弈（POSG）建模搜索者与逃避者的动态对抗。提出了可检测性概念来判定搜索策略是否能保证最终发现目标，并给出相应的博弈求解方法。该框架适用于无人机追逃等对抗性场景。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对传感器限制或干扰导致的不完美感知下的移动目标搜索问题，采用部分可观察随机博弈（POSG）建模搜索者与逃避者的动态对抗。提出了可检测性概念来判定搜索策略是否能保证最终发现目标，并给出相应的博弈求解方法。该框架适用于无人机追逃等对抗性场景。

quick_skim.title: Memory-Efficient Meta-Reinforcement Learning for Adaptive Safety-Critical Control in Adversarial Spacecraft Proximity Operations
quick_skim.abstract: Autonomous spacecraft rendezvous and proximity operations (RPO) require controllers that guarantee safety under thrust constraints while minimizing fuel expenditure. Input-constrained control barrier functions (ICCBFs) provide a control method for nonlinear systems with actuation constraints that construct a forward-invariant safe set. Previous work has shown that learning class-$\mathcal{K}$ functions defining the ICCBF recursion via meta reinforcement learning (meta-RL) yields a robust, non-greedy approach to safety-critical control in RPO. This paper extends that framework further by investigating the performance of three recurrent network architectures (Long Short Term Memory (LSTM), Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU), Selective State Space Model (Mamba)) and two training algorithms (Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) and Soft Actor Critic (SAC)) to identify the best setup for tuning ICCBF class-K functions via meta-RL. In addition to cooperative test cases, performance is evaluated in the presence of adversarial behavior where the target spacecraft behaves in a way that worsens the safety of the chaser spacecraft. Results indicate that state space models such as Mamba when used with PPO achieve superior task completion, safety, and fuel-savings compared to other architectures, across all cooperative and uncooperative scenarios tested.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 元强化学习用于对抗性追逃控制
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 元强化学习用于对抗性追逃控制
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 元强化学习用于对抗性追逃控制
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Meta-RL for safety-critical spacecraft proximity operations, directly analogous to UAV pursuit-evasion.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 自主航天器交会需要保证安全的同时节省燃料。本文利用元强化学习学习控制屏障函数的类K函数参数，实现鲁棒的非贪心安全控制。研究了三种循环网络架构在对抗性场景下的性能。实验表明元学习能快速适应未知对手策略。该方法的结构与无人机追逃博弈高度相似，可直接迁移。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 自主航天器交会需要保证安全的同时节省燃料。本文利用元强化学习学习控制屏障函数的类K函数参数，实现鲁棒的非贪心安全控制。研究了三种循环网络架构在对抗性场景下的性能。实验表明元学习能快速适应未知对手策略。该方法的结构与无人机追逃博弈高度相似，可直接迁移。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: UAV pursuit evasion strategies using deep reinforcement learning

quick_skim.title: Knowledge Reutilization in Meta-Reinforcement Learning
quick_skim.abstract: Meta-reinforcement learning enables fast adaptation by extracting shared structure from related tasks, but existing end-to-end methods often couple task inference with embodiment-specific control. This coupling can obscure non-parametric task semantics, reduce sample efficiency, and limit cross-agent reuse. We propose a meta-knowledge reutilization framework that learns task-level knowledge on a dynamics-simplified agent and transfers it to heterogeneous agents. The framework uses a Bayesian non-parametric prior to organize latent task modes and a high-level policy to generate task-level magnitude guidance. To bridge reusable task knowledge with different embodiments, we introduce a semantic-magnitude interface and a lightweight temporal adaptor, which convert frozen meta-knowledge into temporally aligned subgoals for embodiment-specific low-level controllers. Experiments on multiple locomotion agents show that our framework reduces final-step tracking error by 94.75% -- 99.79% compared with recent state-of-the-art baselines and achieves comparable deployment performance with about 23.8% of their interaction data.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: meta-RL knowledge transfer for heterogeneous agents
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 元强化学习知识迁移用于异构智能体
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 元强化学习知识迁移用于异构智能体
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 元强化学习知识迁移用于异构智能体
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Meta-knowledge reutilization framework for heterogeneous agents, enabling cross-platform transfer for UAV swarms.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有元强化学习将任务推理与具体本体耦合，限制了跨智能体重用。本文提出元知识复用框架，先在动力学简化智能体上学习任务知识，再迁移到异构智能体。使用贝叶斯非参数先验组织隐任务模式，并引入语义-幅度接口实现不同本体间的策略迁移。实验表明该方法显著提升了异构多智能体系统的样本效率。对多无人机协同围捕中的快速适应有重要价值。

quick_skim.matched_query_text: multi-agent reinforcement learning for UAV swarm

quick_skim.title: VFACamou: View-Fused Adversarial Camouflage for Environment-Adaptive Physical Evasion
quick_skim.abstract: Adversarial camouflage in the physical world remains highly challenging, particularly under UAV reconnaissance where targets undergo continuous geometric changes and extreme illumination variations. Existing methods either optimize 2D digital perturbations that fail to generalize to dynamic viewpoints or produce visually unnatural textures that cannot be deployed in real scenarios. Therefore, we propose an end-to-end framework for adversarial camouflage generation that automatically produces wearable adversarial patterns and maintains stable attack performance in real physical environments with changing viewpoints, poses, and lighting conditions. Our method integrates UV-volume rendering with a diffusion-based texture generator, enabling consistent appearance under varying scales, poses, and lighting conditions. To ensure environmental realism, we propose an illumination color consistency estimator that extracts dominant background attributes and guides a natural texture loss to align the generated UV texture with the surrounding environment. A multi-scale dynamic training strategy further enhances robustness against viewpoint shifts and body deformation. Extensive experiments across multiple mainstream detectors demonstrate that our method achieves strong and stable physical attack performance while maintaining high perceptual naturalness, reducing human detection rates without introducing unnatural artifacts.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: evasion against UAV reconnaissance relevant to pursuit-evasion game
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 针对无人机侦察的规避，相关于追逃博弈
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 针对无人机侦察的规避，相关于追逃博弈
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 针对无人机侦察的规避，相关于追逃博弈
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes an end-to-end adversarial camouflage framework using UV-volume rendering and diffusion-based texture generation to evade UAV reconnaissance efficiently under varying viewpoints and lighting.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对无人机侦察下的物理规避难题，提出了一种端到端的对抗性伪装框架，通过UV体积渲染与扩散模型生成可穿戴的对抗图案。该方法在动态视角和光照条件下保持攻击稳定性，有效提升了物理世界中的规避性能。实验结果验证了其在实际部署中的有效性，为无人机追逃博弈中的规避策略提供了新思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对无人机侦察下的物理规避难题，提出了一种端到端的对抗性伪装框架，通过UV体积渲染与扩散模型生成可穿戴的对抗图案。该方法在动态视角和光照条件下保持攻击稳定性，有效提升了物理世界中的规避性能。实验结果验证了其在实际部署中的有效性，为无人机追逃博弈中的规避策略提供了新思路。
